overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The character traverses wet streets under elevated highways, crosses intersections with flying traffic, and walks through commercial areas with holographic advertisements and shop fronts.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the elevated highway toward the intersection, with neon reflections visible on the wet pavement

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass structure spanning the street above
large cylindrical building covered in rotating holographic advertisements
tall glass tower with illuminated windows and neon accents
red metal pole with traffic signals and yellow warning stripes

segments.scene_description: The character walks beneath a massive elevated highway in a neon-lit cyberpunk city. The wet asphalt reflects pink and blue neon lights from surrounding buildings. A large cylindrical billboard structure dominates the right side of the view while skyscrapers rise in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with yellow striped crosswalk

events.description: flying vehicle speeds through the intersection from left to right
character completes crossing and steps onto the opposite sidewalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection following yellow striped crosswalk lines while vehicles pass by

notable_agents.action: flying car speeds horizontally through the intersection above the road

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing lines
tall modern street lamp with multiple light fixtures

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a major intersection with bold yellow crosswalk stripes. A flying vehicle zips through the intersection mid-air. The camera passes the traffic light pole and moves toward the glass skyscraper on the left, while the cylindrical billboard recedes into the background.

agents.ego_description: walking along the curved sidewalk under the overpass, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: tall rectangular digital display showing animated advertisements
modern street lighting fixture on metal pole

segments.scene_description: Walking along a curved concrete sidewalk beneath the elevated highway, the character passes digital advertisement pillars and street lamps. The cylindrical billboard is now visible in the distance on the left as the path curves around the building complex.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial plaza entrance with shop fronts

events.description: entering the covered plaza area with red structural beams and shop fronts

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering the commercial building plaza with red structural elements

entered.detail: overhanging entrance structure with illuminated signage
heavy red steel support beams with industrial aesthetic
storefronts with metal shutters and neon signage

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered commercial plaza characterized by heavy red structural beams and shop fronts. The environment transitions from the open sidewalk to a more enclosed space with industrial architecture and scattered pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with neon shop signs and graffiti

agents.ego_description: walking past closed shop fronts with neon open signs and graffiti-covered walls

entered.detail: green neon sign reading OPEN above a shop entrance
wall covered with illuminated digital posters and advertisements
scattered paper and debris on the ground

segments.scene_description: Moving through a narrow enclosed walkway, the character passes shop fronts with green neon 'OPEN' signs and walls covered in digital graffiti. The red structural beams now loom closer on the left as the path leads deeper into the building complex.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with glass railings overlooking city

events.description: exiting the enclosed shop area onto the elevated walkway with panoramic city view

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated walkway with glass railings overlooking the neon cityscape below

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking toward the camera along the walkway

entered.detail: transparent glass safety railing overlooking the lower city levels
panoramic view of distant skyscrapers with smoke and neon lights
tall vertical neon light strip running up the building facade
illuminated vending machine with digital display

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the enclosed shop corridor, the character walks onto an elevated pedestrian walkway with glass railings offering a panoramic view of the cyberpunk city skyline. Neon-lit skyscrapers rise in the distance with visible smoke plumes, while a vertical neon pillar illuminates the center of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the wet, open streets of a neon-lit metropolis into a dense commercial complex before emerging onto a high-altitude overlook. It begins beneath a massive elevated highway where pink and blue lights reflect off damp asphalt, moving past a towering cylindrical billboard toward a major intersection as a flying vehicle zips overhead. As the camera follows the character along a curved concrete sidewalk, the open city air shifts into a more enclosed environment characterized by heavy red structural beams and industrial shop fronts. The scene then narrows into a corridor of digital graffiti and green neon signs before finally opening up onto an elevated pedestrian walkway. This final transition reveals a panoramic skyline of glowing skyscrapers and smoke plumes, centered around a brilliant vertical neon pillar.
